Functions to manage the idle timeout for an app, including start, stop, pause, resume, and refresh.

# Purpose
This C header file declares a set of functions to manage an idle timeout mechanism for an application. The functions include [`app_idle_timeout_start`](<#app_idle_timeout_start>), [`app_idle_timeout_stop`](<#app_idle_timeout_stop>), [`app_idle_timeout_pause`](<#app_idle_timeout_pause>), [`app_idle_timeout_resume`](<#app_idle_timeout_resume>), and [`app_idle_timeout_refresh`](<#app_idle_timeout_refresh>). These functions allow the application to start, stop, pause, resume, and refresh the idle timeout, respectively. Each function is designed to be safe to call even if the idle timeout is not currently active. This functionality is useful for controlling application behavior based on user inactivity.
